urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: More Canadian wildfire smoke shrouds US midwest, mid-Atlantic and north-east
latest.summary: The Empire State Building and the New York City skyline were obscured by wildfire smoke on Friday. Approximately 109 million people across the US are experiencing poor air quality due to smoke from Canadian wildfires.
latest.details: The Empire State Building and the New York City skyline were obscured by wildfire smoke on Friday. Approximately 109 million people across the US are experiencing poor air quality due to smoke from Canadian wildfires. Major cities like Chicago and Detroit have reported hazardous air quality levels, prompting health warnings for residents. The Copernicus satellite model indicates significant carbon emissions from these wildfires.
latest.full_brief: The Empire State Building and the New York City skyline were obscured by wildfire smoke on Friday. Approximately 109 million people across the US are experiencing poor air quality due to smoke from Canadian wildfires. Major cities like Chicago and Detroit have reported hazardous air quality levels, prompting health warnings for residents. The Copernicus satellite model indicates significant carbon emissions from these wildfires.

latest.title: EU proposes slowing down cuts to carbon emissions for businesses
latest.summary: The European Union has proposed reforms to slow down cuts to greenhouse gas emissions limits for businesses. These changes would allow some industries to obtain emission allowances until 2038, extending the timeline for carbon output reduction.
latest.details: The European Union has proposed reforms to slow down cuts to greenhouse gas emissions limits for businesses. These changes would allow some industries to obtain emission allowances until 2038, extending the timeline for carbon output reduction. The proposals are still subject to approval by EU countries and lawmakers, which may take up to a year. The European Commission aims to align these changes with the EU's goal of reducing carbon emissions by 90% by 2040.
latest.full_brief: The European Union has proposed reforms to slow down cuts to greenhouse gas emissions limits for businesses. These changes would allow some industries to obtain emission allowances until 2038, extending the timeline for carbon output reduction. The proposals are still subject to approval by EU countries and lawmakers, which may take up to a year. The European Commission aims to align these changes with the EU's goal of reducing carbon emissions by 90% by 2040.

latest.title: US denies Iranian claims it hit civilian infrastructure in latest strikes
latest.summary: The US has denied Iranian claims that it targeted civilian infrastructure in recent air strikes. Iranian state media reported that various civilian sites, including bridges and an airport, were hit during the strikes.
latest.details: The US has denied Iranian claims that it targeted civilian infrastructure in recent air strikes. Iranian state media reported that various civilian sites, including bridges and an airport, were hit during the strikes. The US maintains that its actions were focused solely on military targets to degrade Iranian military capabilities. Seven fatalities were reported in Hormozgan province following the strikes.
latest.full_brief: The US has denied Iranian claims that it targeted civilian infrastructure in recent air strikes. Iranian state media reported that various civilian sites, including bridges and an airport, were hit during the strikes. The US maintains that its actions were focused solely on military targets to degrade Iranian military capabilities. Seven fatalities were reported in Hormozgan province following the strikes.

latest.title: China hits out at British Steel nationalisation
latest.summary: The UK government has nationalized British Steel to protect jobs and maintain a vital national capability. China's commerce ministry criticized this move, stating it infringes on the rights of Jingye Group, the company's owner.
latest.details: The UK government has nationalized British Steel to protect jobs and maintain a vital national capability. China's commerce ministry criticized this move, stating it infringes on the rights of Jingye Group, the company's owner. The UK government has indicated that it will appoint an independent valuer to assess any compensation due to Jingye. The nationalization decision may impact UK-China relations amid ongoing economic discussions.
latest.full_brief: The UK government has nationalized British Steel to protect jobs and maintain a vital national capability. China's commerce ministry criticized this move, stating it infringes on the rights of Jingye Group, the company's owner. The UK government has indicated that it will appoint an independent valuer to assess any compensation due to Jingye. The nationalization decision may impact UK-China relations amid ongoing economic discussions.

latest.title: Robodebt whistleblower was told her royal commission evidence ‘could cost you your job’, court…
latest.summary: Jeannie-Marie Blake was a key whistleblower in the robodebt scandal, exposing issues with the scheme while still working for the government. She alleges that her department made repeated threats against her before and after her testimony at the royal commission.
latest.details: Jeannie-Marie Blake was a key whistleblower in the robodebt scandal, exposing issues with the scheme while still working for the government. She alleges that her department made repeated threats against her before and after her testimony at the royal commission. Blake was the only current Services Australia employee to give voluntary testimony, which was crucial to the investigation. She has expressed that the trauma from the scheme has left her battling severe mental health issues.
latest.full_brief: Jeannie-Marie Blake was a key whistleblower in the robodebt scandal, exposing issues with the scheme while still working for the government. She alleges that her department made repeated threats against her before and after her testimony at the royal commission. Blake was the only current Services Australia employee to give voluntary testimony, which was crucial to the investigation. She has expressed that the trauma from the scheme has left her battling severe mental health issues.

latest.title: NASA Welcomes Mauritius as 70th Artemis Accords Signatory
latest.summary: The Republic of Mauritius has officially joined the Artemis Accords, becoming the seventh African country to do so. NASA's Deputy Administrator Matt Anderson welcomed Mauritius during a signing ceremony in Ébène.
latest.details: The Republic of Mauritius has officially joined the Artemis Accords, becoming the seventh African country to do so. NASA's Deputy Administrator Matt Anderson welcomed Mauritius during a signing ceremony in Ébène. The Permanent Secretary of Mauritius signed the accords, emphasizing the country's commitment to responsible space governance. NASA's engagement with Mauritius dates back to its global mapping efforts between 1965 and 1980.
latest.full_brief: The Republic of Mauritius has officially joined the Artemis Accords, becoming the seventh African country to do so. NASA's Deputy Administrator Matt Anderson welcomed Mauritius during a signing ceremony in Ébène. The Permanent Secretary of Mauritius signed the accords, emphasizing the country's commitment to responsible space governance. NASA's engagement with Mauritius dates back to its global mapping efforts between 1965 and 1980.

latest.title: Weather tracker: Thunderstorms strike across Europe amid record heatwave
latest.summary: Thunderstorms have struck across Europe amid a record heatwave, causing severe weather conditions. Hailstones the size of golf balls were reported in parts of France, leading to damage to vehicles and buildings.
latest.details: Thunderstorms have struck across Europe amid a record heatwave, causing severe weather conditions. Hailstones the size of golf balls were reported in parts of France, leading to damage to vehicles and buildings. Localized flooding occurred in cities like Wrocław, Poland, where roads and tram tracks were closed. In Bangladesh, monsoon rains have resulted in at least 53 fatalities and significant flooding.
latest.full_brief: Thunderstorms have struck across Europe amid a record heatwave, causing severe weather conditions. Hailstones the size of golf balls were reported in parts of France, leading to damage to vehicles and buildings. Localized flooding occurred in cities like Wrocław, Poland, where roads and tram tracks were closed. In Bangladesh, monsoon rains have resulted in at least 53 fatalities and significant flooding.

latest.title: Apple Music is getting a price hike
latest.summary: Apple Music has announced a price increase for its subscription plans in the US. The individual plan now costs $11.99 per month, while the family plan has risen to $19.99.
latest.details: Apple Music has announced a price increase for its subscription plans in the US. The individual plan now costs $11.99 per month, while the family plan has risen to $19.99. This price hike is attributed to rising licensing costs, according to Apple. Other subscription services, such as Spotify, have also recently increased their prices.
latest.full_brief: Apple Music has announced a price increase for its subscription plans in the US. The individual plan now costs $11.99 per month, while the family plan has risen to $19.99. This price hike is attributed to rising licensing costs, according to Apple. Other subscription services, such as Spotify, have also recently increased their prices.

latest.title: NASA Invites Media to Roman Space Telescope, Crew-13 Launches
latest.summary: NASA has opened media accreditation for the upcoming launch of the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope. The telescope is scheduled to launch aboard a SpaceX Falcon Heavy rocket from Kennedy Space Center.
latest.details: NASA has opened media accreditation for the upcoming launch of the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope. The telescope is scheduled to launch aboard a SpaceX Falcon Heavy rocket from Kennedy Space Center. Additionally, the Crew-13 mission will carry astronauts to the International Space Station and is set to launch in mid-September. This mission will mark NASA's 13th commercial crew rotation with SpaceX.
latest.full_brief: NASA has opened media accreditation for the upcoming launch of the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope. The telescope is scheduled to launch aboard a SpaceX Falcon Heavy rocket from Kennedy Space Center. Additionally, the Crew-13 mission will carry astronauts to the International Space Station and is set to launch in mid-September. This mission will mark NASA's 13th commercial crew rotation with SpaceX.

latest.title: US Republicans accuse Canada of wildfire inaction
latest.summary: Four Republican members of Congress have criticized Canada for not doing enough to prevent wildfire smoke from affecting the US. They expressed their concerns in a letter to the Canadian prime minister, stating that the situation is unacceptable.
latest.details: Four Republican members of Congress have criticized Canada for not doing enough to prevent wildfire smoke from affecting the US. They expressed their concerns in a letter to the Canadian prime minister, stating that the situation is unacceptable. As of Friday, over 890 wildfires were actively burning in Canada, with significant destruction reported. The air quality in Detroit was reported as the worst in the world, highlighting the widespread impact of the wildfires.
latest.full_brief: Four Republican members of Congress have criticized Canada for not doing enough to prevent wildfire smoke from affecting the US. They expressed their concerns in a letter to the Canadian prime minister, stating that the situation is unacceptable. As of Friday, over 890 wildfires were actively burning in Canada, with significant destruction reported. The air quality in Detroit was reported as the worst in the world, highlighting the widespread impact of the wildfires.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.
